sourceTitle: The use of AI by students
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Therefore, in general terms, the use of AI may be allowed in assessments only with the explicit permission of the teacher. If no explicit permission is given, then the students must assume the use of AI is not allowed.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: IfKW assessment guidance requires explicit teacher permission for AI use.
evidenceLocator: Section: Whether use of AI is permitted for assessed work
